attributes.title: [IBM MQ OTel] Message Traffic
attributes.description: Detailed message throughput analysis for IBM MQ queue managers including put/get rates, byte throughput, persistence breakdown, pub/sub activity, and connection metrics.

params.markdown:
## [IBM MQ OTel] Message Traffic

This dashboard provides detailed insight into IBM MQ message flow:
- Per-queue-manager put and get message rates
- Byte throughput for puts and gets
- Persistent vs non-persistent message breakdown
- Pub/sub topic and subscriber delivery rates
- Connection and disconnection activity

query.esql:
TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS put_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS put_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS get_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS get_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_bytes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS put_bytes = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_bytes_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_bytes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS put_bytes = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_bytes_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_bytes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS get_bytes = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_bytes_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_bytes_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS get_bytes = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_bytes_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_topic_mqput_mqput1_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS topic_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_topic_mqput_mqput1_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_topic_mqput_mqput1_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS topic_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_topic_mqput_mqput1_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_published_to_subscribers_message_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS sub_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_published_to_subscribers_message_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_published_to_subscribers_message_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS sub_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_published_to_subscribers_message_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_mqconn_mqconnx_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS conn_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqconn_mqconnx_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_mqconn_mqconnx_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS conn_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqconn_mqconnx_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_mqdisc_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS disc_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqdisc_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_mqdisc_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS disc_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqdisc_total))

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS put_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.qmgr
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS put_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.qmgr
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS get_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.qmgr
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| WHERE ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_total IS NOT NULL
| STATS get_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.qmgr
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| STATS put_bytes = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_bytes_total)), get_bytes = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_bytes_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| STATS put_bytes = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_bytes_total)), get_bytes = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_bytes_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| STATS connects = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqconn_mqconnx_total)), disconnects = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqdisc_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| STATS connects = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqconn_mqconnx_total)), disconnects = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqdisc_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| STATS persistent_put = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_persistent_message_mqput_total)), non_persistent_put = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_non_persistent_message_mqput_total)), persistent_put1 = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_persistent_message_mqput1_total)), non_persistent_put1 = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_non_persistent_message_mqput1_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL persistent = COALESCE(persistent_put, 0) + COALESCE(persistent_put1, 0), non_persistent = COALESCE(non_persistent_put, 0) + COALESCE(non_persistent_put1, 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| STATS persistent_put = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_persistent_message_mqput_total)), non_persistent_put = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_non_persistent_message_mqput_total)), persistent_put1 = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_persistent_message_mqput1_total)), non_persistent_put1 = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_non_persistent_message_mqput1_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL persistent = COALESCE(persistent_put, 0) + COALESCE(persistent_put1, 0), non_persistent = COALESCE(non_persistent_put, 0) + COALESCE(non_persistent_put1, 0)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| STATS persistent = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_persistent_message_destructive_get_total)), non_persistent = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_non_persistent_message_destructive_get_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| STATS persistent = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_persistent_message_destructive_get_total)), non_persistent = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_non_persistent_message_destructive_get_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Topic Put vs Subscriber Delivery Rate

query.esql:
TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| STATS topic_puts = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_topic_mqput_mqput1_total)), sub_delivery = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_published_to_subscribers_message_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| STATS topic_puts = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_topic_mqput_mqput1_total)), sub_delivery = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_published_to_subscribers_message_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| STATS durable_create = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_durable_subscription_create_total)), durable_delete = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_durable_subscription_delete_total)), non_durable_create = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_non_durable_subscription_create_total)), non_durable_delete = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_non_durable_subscription_delete_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| STATS durable_create = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_durable_subscription_create_total)), durable_delete = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_durable_subscription_delete_total)), non_durable_create = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_non_durable_subscription_create_total)), non_durable_delete = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_non_durable_subscription_delete_total)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

attributes.title: Message Traffic Summary by Queue Manager

query.esql:
TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| STATS put_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_total)), get_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_total)), put_bytes = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_bytes_total)), get_bytes = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_bytes_total)), conn_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqconn_mqconnx_total)), topic_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_topic_mqput_mqput1_total)), sub_delivery = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_published_to_subscribers_message_total)) BY attributes.qmgr
| SORT put_rate DESC
| LIMIT 50

TS metrics-ibmmq.otel-*
| STATS put_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_total)), get_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_total)), put_bytes = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqput_mqput1_bytes_total)), get_bytes = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_destructive_get_bytes_total)), conn_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_mqconn_mqconnx_total)), topic_rate = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_topic_mqput_mqput1_total)), sub_delivery = SUM(RATE(ibmmq_qmgr_published_to_subscribers_message_total)) BY attributes.qmgr
| SORT put_rate DESC
| LIMIT 50
